markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[To discuss and demonstrate the process of setting up equity plans and option grants in Carta for GrowthX AI's recent Series A funding.](https://fathom.video/share/so4CNwWMiGLLBoyGYsZpNEN6o3yq4Qy3?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Carta can be used to create and manage equity plans, option grants, and board approvals efficiently](https://fathom.video/share/so4CNwWMiGLLBoyGYsZpNEN6o3yq4Qy3?tab=summary&timestamp=65.0)
  - [GrowthX AI needs to wait for their official 409A valuation before proceeding with full setup](https://fathom.video/share/so4CNwWMiGLLBoyGYsZpNEN6o3yq4Qy3?tab=summary&timestamp=92.0)
  - [The process involves creating the equity plan, getting board approval, and then issuing individual grants](https://fathom.video/share/so4CNwWMiGLLBoyGYsZpNEN6o3yq4Qy3?tab=summary&timestamp=405.0)
  - [Carta provides templates and streamlined workflows for board consents and approvals](https://fathom.video/share/so4CNwWMiGLLBoyGYsZpNEN6o3yq4Qy3?tab=summary&timestamp=1470.0)

## Topics

### Carta Setup and Valuation

  - [GrowthX AI recently closed Series A funding but hasn't issued option grants yet](https://fathom.video/share/so4CNwWMiGLLBoyGYsZpNEN6o3yq4Qy3?tab=summary&timestamp=50.0)
  - [A 409A valuation is in progress, expected in about two weeks](https://fathom.video/share/so4CNwWMiGLLBoyGYsZpNEN6o3yq4Qy3?tab=summary&timestamp=95.0)
  - [John demonstrated how to add a non-Carta valuation in the system:](https://fathom.video/share/so4CNwWMiGLLBoyGYsZpNEN6o3yq4Qy3?tab=summary&timestamp=131.0)
      - [Used $5.81 as the fair market value per share](https://fathom.video/share/so4CNwWMiGLLBoyGYsZpNEN6o3yq4Qy3?tab=summary&timestamp=214.0)
      - [Set an effective date of February 26, 2025 (placeholder)](https://fathom.video/share/so4CNwWMiGLLBoyGYsZpNEN6o3yq4Qy3?tab=summary&timestamp=314.0)

### Equity Plan Creation

  - [John showed how to create an equity plan in Carta:](https://fathom.video/share/so4CNwWMiGLLBoyGYsZpNEN6o3yq4Qy3?tab=summary&timestamp=1003.0)
      - [Upload existing plan or create new one](https://fathom.video/share/so4CNwWMiGLLBoyGYsZpNEN6o3yq4Qy3?tab=summary&timestamp=1416.0)
      - [Set plan details like reserve pool size, vesting windows, and plan duration](https://fathom.video/share/so4CNwWMiGLLBoyGYsZpNEN6o3yq4Qy3?tab=summary&timestamp=782.0)
      - [Carta generates necessary documentation, including board resolutions](https://fathom.video/share/so4CNwWMiGLLBoyGYsZpNEN6o3yq4Qy3?tab=summary&timestamp=1137.0)

### Option Grants Process

  - [Demonstrated how to create individual option grants:](https://fathom.video/share/so4CNwWMiGLLBoyGYsZpNEN6o3yq4Qy3?tab=summary&timestamp=839.0)
      - [Can be done one-by-one or via bulk upload spreadsheet](https://fathom.video/share/so4CNwWMiGLLBoyGYsZpNEN6o3yq4Qy3?tab=summary&timestamp=883.0)
      - [Includes details like grant size, vesting schedule, and expiration date](https://fathom.video/share/so4CNwWMiGLLBoyGYsZpNEN6o3yq4Qy3?tab=summary&timestamp=841.0)
  - [Explained difference between ISO (for US-based employees) and NSO grants](https://fathom.video/share/so4CNwWMiGLLBoyGYsZpNEN6o3yq4Qy3?tab=summary&timestamp=1396.0)

### Board Approval Workflow

  - [Carta facilitates board approvals for equity plans and option grants:](https://fathom.video/share/so4CNwWMiGLLBoyGYsZpNEN6o3yq4Qy3?tab=summary&timestamp=1432.0)
      - [Creates board consent documents](https://fathom.video/share/so4CNwWMiGLLBoyGYsZpNEN6o3yq4Qy3?tab=summary&timestamp=1432.0)
      - [Notifies board members for electronic approval](https://fathom.video/share/so4CNwWMiGLLBoyGYsZpNEN6o3yq4Qy3?tab=summary&timestamp=1440.0)
      - [Automates grant issuance upon full approval](https://fathom.video/share/so4CNwWMiGLLBoyGYsZpNEN6o3yq4Qy3?tab=summary&timestamp=1443.0)

### Preferred Stock Setup

  - [For investors, new share classes (e.g., Series A Preferred) need to be created](https://fathom.video/share/so4CNwWMiGLLBoyGYsZpNEN6o3yq4Qy3?tab=summary&timestamp=1921.0)
  - [Requires updated Certificate of Incorporation from Delaware](https://fathom.video/share/so4CNwWMiGLLBoyGYsZpNEN6o3yq4Qy3?tab=summary&timestamp=1933.0)
  - [John demonstrated how to add new share classes and issue preferred shares in Carta](https://fathom.video/share/so4CNwWMiGLLBoyGYsZpNEN6o3yq4Qy3?tab=summary&timestamp=1949.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Wait for official 409A valuation report (expected in \~2 weeks)](https://fathom.video/share/so4CNwWMiGLLBoyGYsZpNEN6o3yq4Qy3?tab=summary&timestamp=1186.0)
  - [Close remaining angel investments this week](https://fathom.video/share/so4CNwWMiGLLBoyGYsZpNEN6o3yq4Qy3?tab=summary&timestamp=2208.0)
  - [Bridget to practice Carta setup in sandbox environment](https://fathom.video/share/so4CNwWMiGLLBoyGYsZpNEN6o3yq4Qy3?tab=summary&timestamp=1725.0)
  - [Schedule follow-up call with John if needed for assistance with actual setup](https://fathom.video/share/so4CNwWMiGLLBoyGYsZpNEN6o3yq4Qy3?tab=summary&timestamp=2258.0)
  - [Prepare to upload Certificate of Incorporation and create preferred stock class for investors](https://fathom.video/share/so4CNwWMiGLLBoyGYsZpNEN6o3yq4Qy3?tab=summary&timestamp=1933.0)
  - [Consider granting Carta access to legal counsel if needed for setup process](https://fathom.video/share/so4CNwWMiGLLBoyGYsZpNEN6o3yq4Qy3?tab=summary&timestamp=1810.0)
